reviews.review_description:
i’ve seen how harsh some of these other reviews are, and i just don’t think that’s fair to this game. of course i still have complaints, the punching and grabbing especially, but i think if you want an experience just like gorn 1 you should play that instead. this game adds so much more i find myself always choosing it over the first, which starts to feel bland and tired after a little bit. not that it’s a bad game, it’s excellent i just love this one too.

tl;dr if you liked the more interactive hands on combat of the first game, play that instead.

reviews.review_title: Worst 2nd game of any series ive played
reviews.review_description: Genuinely I've never played a worse continue of a series only because I won't play payday 3, I wish I never played this, it removes all the fun hands and noodle physics as well as procedural armor damage as well as honestly anything that made gorn, gorn this game is so terrible compared to the first I wish I could refund it and never gave it the opportunity by finishing the game, it seems more fun by adding new weapons but it's just nothing when you finish, the game ads nonsense and hardly stays true to how the original felt, I hated it so much I had to close the game and felt implied to write a review which I've done maybe twice in my life, I honestly wouldn't recommend this game to anyone who played the original, the direction is also so unclear in the franchise you have to watch YouTube playthroughs first or you won't understand what to do, I spent half a hour on one mission just because I didn't know I had to do something, honesty I'm extremely disappointed and want my money back, and it's criminal I can't leave 0 stars

reviews.review_title: Better sword play than the first.
reviews.review_description:
I played the first game awhile ago and thought it was fun but had confusing hit boxes. For example if there was torso armor it didn’t allow you to slash the torso, even bare skin. Even piercing weapons felt inconsistent and sticky. It made using blunt weapons or big weapons mandatory. 

This game you start out with fists, than a spiked mace that feels useless, but the a wide short short. I immediately realized that i could leave cut marks in flesh when i slashed. I could cut off limbs, even if partially armored. I love walking up to someone without a helmet and just lobbing off their head or cutting it in half. It just feels so satisfying. Archery while not perfect, also seems improved and smoother. 

This game has 4 unique environments instead of one. They each having a unique lord who taunts you they’re all ridiculous. Andway I think it’s perfect size for a vr game and kept me playing for a 3-4 days straight until I beat it. Really fun, Id recommend

It has been over a year since the game came out (First review April 21, 2025), and I think it is time to change my review.

My current complaints and wants:

1. I kinda wish Alimta was back with some challenge since we are in the afterlife after all. I thought that would be what the dungeon mode would be, but it wasn't.

2. Odbekivu is meant to be a God of Gorn, but he doesn't really feel like anything special, and also has no gameplay value, really. He unlocks endless after you beat the game, but why would you do endless when you still have levels to do.

3. Bekivu mode is very bad. Doing it with hardcore on isn't a challenge, just completely unfair, as the hit detection against you is bad. I just tried it again recently and each loss was from a hit that should not have counted as a hit.

4. The art style kinda feels off. I don't really mind it, but sometimes when I'm doing something cool, I see what a rokibe looks like and it takes me out of it.

5. Arena customization. In endless and custom, we can only play the same area styles, with no ability to customize what they look like in the actual levels.

6. Punching has no weight behind it.

Complaints and wants I still hold since last year:

1. The gauntlets. I loved having blades come from my fist and throwing knives. I'd also like having the grappling hook over the telekinesis. We right now only have the iron fists.

2. In the Sort-of-flight mode, I basically only use it in Gorn 1.

3. The custom area, I like the custom area being an entire area instead of just something that pops up.

4. The drag and pull mode, which I feel like makes Gorn, Gorn, I feel like is too rough and uneven, while Gorn 1 felt smooth.

5. More diverse bosses. All of them feel like just another tall boss with high HP when, before, we had stuff like the crab boss and a man who threw badgers.

6. Stronger weapons or weaker enemies. I would like it if my weapons actually worked like in Gorn 1, when a good slice to the head cut it off.

reviews.review_title: Good game, just miss the old gore system
reviews.review_description: As a fan of the first Gorn game, I love how much has been added. The new weapons, bosses, enemies, everything is great! Except... I just feel like there's not enough BLOOD AND GORE. The old game did a great job, at making it feel like you were actually cutting these guys in half, with the weapons getting a nice coat of blood on them, each and every time you used them, dripping with blood as well. I know this review may make me sound just a little bit psychotic, but it's the truth 🤷‍♂️. I just think there should be a gore overhaul update or something. Or at the very least, make it an option someone can turn on or off in the settings, or something like that. We want more, GORE!!!🔥🗣️🩸🗡️💣🔪

This game is good stab people heart crush people head you can make weapons their big,small,range and creative weapons you can make arenas and their mod support the stuff the games is multiplayer more creative weapons and a mode for less bendable weapons but otherwise this game is great!

reviews.review_title: Great game made even better with updates
reviews.review_description: The game has you fighting in each boss arena multiple times until you reach the final stage of the arena and the boss himself decides to fight you. It's super satisfying killing each boss and seeing how miserable they actually are. The boss fights and the arenas are different from each other. They contain their own unique hazards, weapons, and mechanics. The weapons are varied and some are definitely more OP than the others lol but it's all part of the fun. The updates have introduced even more little campaigns and weapons with unique effects and abilities. Very solid game that knows what it wants to be and I recommend it to anyone that's interested.

It would be a cool joke weapon! If you don't want to take my idea its fine but would be cool to have it in your game! If you read this thanks! and put this idea in your game!

reviews.review_title: Fan of first one and loved  this!
reviews.review_description: So many updates and modes have been added. I'm glad I waited to pick this up. The physics and gore are better than the first. Graphics look clean like a real animated cartoon. OG weapons and arena have been added, mods have been added, rogue like dungeon has been added. Zombies have been added!!! Sandbox mode....What more did anyone expect LMAO it's a dream come true if you loved the first one. An upgrade, sequel and a dlc all at the same time. Now is the time to buy this game. Lots of love was put into this. Bravo, devs
I think vr is the funnest device i have and gorn 2 is my favourite game even after i did the chalnage of fighting the five bosses i still find new fun things to do its very fun all the time

reviews.review_title: Good, but not as good as the first one
reviews.review_description: It's a good VR game, but the first felt way better. The first had more hands that were really fun such as the crab hands, I miss those. Second, they really nerfed the crap out of normal fists. In the original, fists were actually pretty good. Now, they are just horrible and you can't really go unarmed because it deals barely any damage at all. The bosses are different from the original one, and they did feel better than the old ones, but I still miss the old champions. It's fun, but different. If you are more of an unarmed person like me, buy the original game. If you like weapons and big boss fights, buy this one.

reviews.review_description: I had GORN for a year but this game brought GORN to be stronger than ever. The one thing you missed was special gloves and multiplayer would be awesome. Thanks devs

So i am a fan of games like gorn and i love it, and this is on par with the first game but there are some problems. First off, there is no replayability value, once your Done all you can do is toy around with weapons or mods which there are only about 15 mods.And most of the boss fights arent to complex. The game is still fun but its up to you to buy it. Maybe the updates will get better in the future. And a little suggestion but i would feel co-op 2-4 players would be fun with increasing difficulty. But thats just my thoughts. I love you Cortpia Studios

reviews.review_title: the first gorn is trash compared to this
reviews.review_description:
this game is way better than the first one but i agree with most people that the final boss should be nerfed but in my opinion only at least a little bit cuz i'm a terrible multitasker

This is awesome, it has much more gore and blood than the last which makes it much more fun I also like the new physics were you actually have the hit them hard like them just running into your fist and dying.(PS story is epic, the false gods are so hilariously stupid.)

This game sucks because it is extremely glitchy, the bosses are unfair, and the final boss is complete slop. Him on his own is not bad but in order to unlock a weapon I went back on hardcore mode. And the fight is basically impossible. In the normal waves, the exploding barrels that chase you are faster then you so if they spawn its a guaranteed hit. And on the actual boss, the projectiles he shoots out are so fast you can't outrun them. They also make no sound so unless you are constantly looking in the sky you don't know if they are coming. And sometimes the boss will hit you and no enemies spawn in so you can't regen. And even then sometimes when you kill someone you don't heal so you just die. And the worst part is that if you die, (which you probably will) you have to redo the entire fight and all the waves before it. And even in the base game the hitboxes suck. Like someone can be on the ground, stuned, and just because you walked over their weapon you get hit. Also the game doesn't have any of the glove weapons the first game did others then the iron fist. And they were the best part of the first game. And there are so many more problems but it will take too long to type. Overall, this game is trash.

developer_response.body:
Hi Bubbawubba21. 
Thanks for your feedback and sorry to hear of your discomfort. As a developer it's sometimes hard to keep the balance between adding new content and bug fixing the O.G game. It is unfortunate that you think we suck but we will fix the issues with the Brain boss fight asap in an upcoming hotpatch. Hopefully that will be enough to  move us one notch above trash. 

Please join our  Discord if you have any more suggestions how we should improve the game. https://discord.gg/WMPrzFan

developer_response.body:
Sorry Pizza_rolls for not delivering on you expectations. It sure sounds like a bad issue you encountered there. I understands it sucks to loose progression like you did but thanks for highlighting it and helping us improve the game. 

We had a stressful time before the holidays in getting the Dungeon crawler update out on time and unfortunately a couple of bugs sneaked in there with it. We'll take care most of them now and they should be addressed in the upcoming 1.6.2 patch. 

If you have more stuff you want us to know about please join our Discord. https://discord.gg/WMPrzFan

reviews.review_description: At the end of the game after the final boss (add more levels and harder bosses) you have to go through end credits and a rokibae comes out and starts singing a classical piece while more come out in tutus and dance, it’s hella funny

reviews.review_title: Good game but there’s one problem
reviews.review_description:
A very good game, very gory, funny jokes, and an amazing story but while trying to get all the levels beaten on hardcore i couldn’t. It felt impossible because for some odd reason i get killed very early. Example, a rokibe hits me and i lose health like normal but then 2 seconds later when there is still blood on my screen the boss starts saying the lines for whenever they kill me and when i kill the rokibe after the boss insults me i gain no health and the screen slowly becomes more red then instantly cuts my screen to black without the blood fully covering my screen. I tried using other kinds of different weapons but i still keep dying fast.

And one little idea is to add bruising like from the gorn 1 pcvr version and the wounds would swell the area you hit
Love this game!! Will say final boss is a pain but after 4 tries i finally beat him. It's a fun challenging game and it gave me a work out. Highly recommend and cant wait to see whats next.

reviews.review_title: Fun to be had, tedious mechanics
reviews.review_description:
I want to love this game and will give a more thorough review later. On the default difficulty the brain boss has a fast rhythm of putting their shield up, making it way too fast to get in your shots. The weapon used in that fight is the jankiest in the game so far. My grips don't activate often after several attempts. I think the guns without ammo should just disappear because for some odd reason they seem to want to "cling" inside the arena when I want to discard them. I do like the death mechanic and being able to recover be killing, but it seems REALLY imbalanced, like I can't seem to kill with 36 punches and can't rip heads off in those moments? 

Game is a blast when the going is good, but tedious and shows like of polish during some "challenging" encounters. Wouldn't be a big deal if the grips and mechanics acted flawlessly. 

Get on sale 15 or less, or wait for more patches.
Even after beating the bosses the challenges kept me entertained all these people saying the boss fight is way to hard, ITS MEANT TO BE THAT HARD, so skill issue all in all a amazing game
Everything about this sequel is a massive upgrade on the original. The graphics, the physics, the enemy/weapon types, the environments, all better. Great job, devs!
